perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a white bucket hat and white sweater stands in a Costco warehouse aisle, excitedly gesturing towards a stack of Bose boxes. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of the price tag and the Bose Soundbar 550 display model, showing technical specs. (3) The creator points to an almost empty wooden pallet where the product boxes were previously stacked, emphasizing scarcity. (4) The creator stands with her hands on her hips, smiling and talking directly to the lens. (5) The video ends with her posing with a big smile.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks rapidly and enthusiastically in Mandarin about a Black Friday deal. Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music plays in the background. (2) The narrator continues her description over ambient warehouse noises, including distant footsteps and faint store hum. (3) A second, off-screen female voice makes brief exclamations of surprise. (4) The music maintains a constant volume and pace until the video cuts off.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo and '大家搶著買' (Everyone is rushing to buy) in a bold yellow font. (2) Decorative Text: '黑五好康' (Black Friday Goodies) in a black bubble, 'BOSE聲霸' (Bose Soundbar) and '狂降8000元' (Drops 8000 yuan) in large red text for emotional hook. (3) Functional Text: Detailed product sign showing 'BOSE 550' and price '$21,999'. (4) Decorative Text: '快要被拿空了' (Almost sold out) appearing as a variety-show style caption.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Product/Price Proof -> Scarcity Proof -> Closing Pose

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 2 female shoppers visible in the background aisles
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a white NY logo bucket hat, a white long-sleeved top with a cut-out on the shoulder, blue ripped jeans, and a brown cross-body bag.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Large warehouse shelving units, stacks of product boxes (Bose, Balmuda), refrigeration units in the distance, and concrete floors.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is designed to alert viewers to a massive price reduction on a premium audio product at Costco during the Black Friday sales period. By showing empty shelves and using energetic vocal delivery, it aims to drive immediate shopping behavior through a sense of FOMO (Fear Of Missing Out).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed pricing information, focus on brand labels, and a call to action regarding the discount.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Variety-show style text overlays and high-energy 'shopping buddy' persona.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical short-form social commerce content focusing on high-value deals and retail-scarcity psychology.
